title: Development Phase 1 -- Land Acquisition & Entitlement Downstream Data
description: Shape of the dataForDownstream object written to the master checkpoint by the land acquisition & entitlement phase. Covers HBU analysis, residual land value, entitlement pathway, and site capacity.

optimalUseType.description: Highest and best use type (multifamily, office, industrial, retail, mixed-use).

marketRentAssumption.description: Market rent per unit or per SF used in residual analysis.

yieldOnCost.description: Projected yield on cost for HBU program.

developmentSpread.description: YOC minus exit cap rate in basis points.

fallbackProgram.description: By-right fallback if HBU requires entitlement.

maxSupportableLandCost.description: Maximum land price at target returns from reconciled residual analysis.

timelineMonths.description: Base case entitlement timeline in months.

entitlementCostBudget.description: Total entitlement cost including permits, impact fees, and soft costs.

maxDensity.description: Maximum density in units per acre (residential only).
